topic: Perform a ruthless technical IP and market audit for: 'A modular subsea data center cooled naturally by ocean currents, deployed off the coast of major coastal cities to reduce latency and eliminate HVAC energy costs. We are targeting high-frequency trading firms and AI compute clusters.'. Extract exact TAM/SAM sizes, fundings for top 5 competitors. For the IP landscape, you MUST explicitly search patents.google.com and worldwide.espacenet.com to extract 3-5 specific patent family numbers related to this technology. INTERROGATOR DIRECTIVE: Identify and analyze specific regulatory hurdles or proposed changes in maritime law and environmental impact assessments relevant to permanent subsea infrastructure deployments in major coastal economic zones (e.g., US East Coast, UK, Japan) within the last 24 months. Research the typical Levelized Cost of Energy (LCOE) floor prices for offshore renewable energy projects that might compete for similar subsea space or infrastructure, and find any existing patents (with patent numbers) related to subsea data center cooling systems or modular offshore data center designs that could pose an infringement risk. Additionally, find data on the average lifespan and maintenance cost projections for subsea power and data transmission cables installed in the last 5 years.
